description: Direct pricing communication in captions that explicitly states per-person costs with tax clarity and booking contact information, commonly used for F&B service promotions.
structural_recipe: Lead with occasion/greeting (e.g. Ramadan greeting), state venue name and location, display clear per-person price (with tax status noted), include direct booking contact number. Format pricing prominently to facilitate immediate transaction intent.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value transparency in pricing before engagement; stating exact cost upfront reduces friction in decision-making and signals trust. Including a direct phone number aligns with preference for immediate human contact over digital booking flows.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing in SAR may require localization for other Gulf markets with different currency conventions
Direct phone contact preference is strong in Saudi market; removing phone number reduces conversion likelihood
Tax disclaimer ('before tax') is important for regulatory compliance and consumer trust in Saudi F&B sector
cultural_constraints: Seasonal relevance (Ramadan-specific framing) may limit year-round applicability
Formal Arabic greeting convention ('رمضان كريم') is expected during Ramadan period
